scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w server" "npm run start -w client"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run test -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
